case_title: AMERICAN STATES INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORP. vs. RUIZ, ALBERTO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN STATES INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORP. SERVED FEB-16-1995, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, ALBERTO
GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT RUIZ, ALBERTO

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN STATES INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUIZ, ALBERTO $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- JUDGMENT TO BE PAID AT $350 PER MONTH, DATE OF COMMENCEMENT TO BE DETERMINED BY PARTIES. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
